import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut best: Option<Int> = None
  mut best_abs: Int = 0
  mut cur: String = ""
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    let is_end = i == n
    mut is_ws = false
    mut cb = 0
    if not is_end
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      cb = b
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      end
    end
    if is_end or is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          let a = if v < 0
            -v
          else
            v
          end
          match best
          when None
            best = Some(v)
            best_abs = a
          when Some(_)
            if a < best_abs
              best = Some(v)
              best_abs = a
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(cb)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  match best
  when Some(v)
    println("min_abs=#{v}")
  when None
    ()
  end
end
